text:
PRVDR_AFLTD_PGM_ACTV_IND_10 

PRVDR_AFLTD_PGM_ACTV_IND_11 

PRVDR_AFLTD_PGM_ACTV_IND_12 

LABEL: Provider Affiliated Program Active Indicator — January through December 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate the provider’s affiliated programs information specified in the unique combination of 
affiliated program variables (AFLTD_PGM_TYPE_CD and PRVDR_AFLTD_PGM_ID) was active in the 
given month. Each of 12 months.

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_AFLTD_PGM_ACTV_IND_01 
PRVDR_AFLTD_PGM_ACTV_IND_02
